query: Can you groom these three issues before our tech review? They're pretty raw right now.
note: Explicit 'groom' + raw issues headed for tech review = textbook grooming.

query: This story is super vague — I genuinely can't tell what the stakeholder even wants. Flesh it out.
note: Vague intent + 'flesh it out' = clarify WHAT/WHY, grooming's job.

query: Issue #214 is half-written. Tighten up the story and get the scope nailed down so it's ready for the devs to size.
note: 'Tighten the story' + scope, explicitly upstream of sizing = grooming.

query: The product lead dropped a one-liner ticket on me. Can you ask them what they actually mean and write it up properly?
note: Engage the lead with questions to assert intent, then fill the body = grooming.

query: These backlog items are too fuzzy to hand to engineering. Pin down what's in and out of scope for each.
note: Scope boundaries / in-vs-out before engineering, pre-dev product work = grooming.

query: We have a wishlist of feature requests with no detail. Clarify each one's intent until you're confident it reflects the ask.
note: Assert intent to high confidence that the story reflects the ask = grooming verbatim.

query: Before anyone estimates anything, make sure JIRA-88's story is actually right. Engage me with questions if it's unclear.
note: Interactive questions to the lead, explicitly before estimation = grooming, not recon.

query: Get these stories ready for tech review — they're not dev-ready yet, just stakeholder wishes.
note: Not-dev-ready -> ready-for-tech-review is exactly grooming's handoff.

query: I'm not sure this ticket captures what the customer asked for. Can you firm up the WHAT and WHY before we build it?
note: WHAT/WHY product intent pre-build = grooming, deliberately not the HOW.

query: File a new bug for the 404 on the invoice row — here's the repro.
note: Creating/filing a brand-new issue, not grooming an existing vague one.

query: Recon issue #309 and give me a level-of-effort estimate before we dispatch.
note: Already-groomed issue, HOW + LoE sizing = technical-recon, not grooming.

query: This story is vague on implementation — trace it into the code and tell me how big it is.
note: 'Vague' tempts grooming but it's about HOW/size with code tracing = technical-recon.

query: Map how auth works across the whole app and write up the conventions we follow.
note: Whole-app deep-dive into specs, not one issue's intent = spelunking-specs.

query: Apply the agent-effort:high label to these three tickets before we dispatch.
Lock issue #57 and claim it before the agent starts work.
note: Claim/lock protocol — grooming explicitly never claims an issue.

query: The acceptance criteria on #44 are already approved — go ahead and rewrite them to read cleaner.
note: operator explicitly authorizes the AC rewrite this run — grooming's permitted exception

query: Dispatch a sub-agent to implement the groomed ticket #91 and open a PR.
note: Implementation dispatch, downstream of grooming entirely.

query: Can you summarize the last week of messages in our #engineering Slack channel?
note: Truly unrelated — Slack digest, nothing to do with issue grooming.

query: Why isn't my PR merging? CI looks green but it's stuck.
note: Post-open PR lifecycle, unrelated to grooming a story.
